strings.scenes.title: Scenes
strings.scenes.empty: No scenes yet — tap below to create your first one.
strings.sounds.title: Soundboard
strings.sounds.importHint: MP3, WAV or OGG. Plays through the server's speakers.
strings.sounds.empty: No sounds yet — import one above.
strings.sounds.tapHint: Tap to play; tap again to stop. Tap the edit corner to rename, set volume or looping.
strings.library.notConfigured.post: to search the online sound library.
strings.library.searchPlaceholder: e.g. thunder, tavern door, sword clash
strings.library.prompt: Search Freesound for effects and ambience, then import with one tap.
strings.settings.title: Settings
strings.settings.language.title: Language
strings.settings.language.hint: Choose the panel's language. Saved on this device. Community translations live in the server's locales folder — add a file there to offer a new language.
strings.settings.lightSystem.title: Light System
strings.settings.lightSystem.hint: Only the selected system's settings are shown. Scenes and the Lights tab control it.
strings.settings.hue.title: Philips Hue
strings.settings.hue.lightsControlHint: Lights the panel and scenes control (none checked = all lights):
strings.settings.hue.step1pre: Fill in the bridge IP (or tap
strings.settings.hue.step2post: on top of the Hue Bridge.
strings.settings.hue.noBridge: No bridge found — check that it is powered and on the same network, or type the IP manually.
strings.settings.hue.pairedSaved: Paired and saved — pick your lights below.
strings.settings.tuya.title: Tuya Bulb
strings.settings.tuya.keyHint: The local key still comes from the Tuya IoT portal — see the README walkthrough.
strings.settings.tuya.nothingFound: Nothing found. The bulb must be powered and on the same network.
strings.settings.registry.title: Light Registry
strings.settings.registry.hint: Individually addressable lights that scenes and the Lights tab can target one by one.
strings.settings.registry.empty: No lights registered yet — add your Hue lights or the Tuya bulb below.
strings.settings.registry.keyTitle: Stable key used by scenes and endpoints
strings.settings.registry.pairFirst: Pair a Hue bridge above to add Hue lights.
strings.settings.registry.tuyaExists: The Tuya bulb is already registered (only one is supported).
strings.settings.default.title: Default Lighting
strings.settings.default.hint: The state the top-bar reset-lights button restores — e.g. bright white “house lights up” for a break.
strings.settings.default.offHint: The reset button will switch all lights off.
strings.settings.default.empty: No default set yet — pick Colour, White or Off above.
strings.settings.spotify.title: Spotify
strings.settings.spotify.redirectHintA: Add this exact Redirect URI to your app at developer.spotify.com — character for character, no trailing slash. Connect from a browser on this machine (
strings.settings.spotify.redirectHintC: both work). Spotify Premium is required for playback.
strings.settings.freesound.title: Sound library (Freesound)
strings.settings.freesound.hint: Search and import Creative-Commons sound effects on the Sounds tab.
strings.settings.freesound.keyHint: Stored on the server. Create an API credential at freesound.org (apiv2/apply). Leave blank to keep the current token.
strings.settings.freesound.noKey: No token saved yet — the library search on the Sounds tab stays disabled until you add one.
strings.settings.assistant.title: AI Assistant
strings.settings.assistant.providerHint: Which AI backend the in-panel assistant talks to — one active at a time.
strings.settings.assistant.keyHint: Stored on the server. Leave blank to keep the current key.
strings.settings.assistant.modelHint.openai: Model id from platform.openai.com, e.g. gpt-4o.
strings.settings.assistant.modelHint.gemini: Model id from ai.google.dev, e.g. gemini-2.0-flash.
strings.settings.assistant.modelHint.anthropic: Model id from console.anthropic.com, e.g. claude-opus-4-8.
strings.settings.assistant.noKey: No API key saved yet — the Assistant tab stays disabled until you add one.
strings.settings.assistant.mcpHintA: Point Claude Code or Claude Desktop here. Send the panel API key as an
strings.settings.menu.title: Menu
strings.settings.menu.hint: Long-press a tab in the bottom bar and drag it sideways to reorder the menu. The order is saved on this device.
strings.settings.wizard.title: Setup wizard
strings.settings.wizard.hint: Reopen the first-run setup guide — lights, music and extras. Nothing is reset.
strings.onboarding.title: First-run setup
strings.onboarding.welcome.title: Welcome to Scene Maker
strings.onboarding.welcome.blurb: Switch your table's whole mood — lights, music and sound — with one tap. This quick setup connects your gear; every step can be skipped and finished later in Settings.
strings.onboarding.lights.title: Lights
strings.onboarding.lights.blurb: Pick your light system. Scenes will drive its color and brightness over your local network.
strings.onboarding.lights.tuyaIntro: Tuya needs three values: the bulb's IP, device id and local key. Scan finds the first two; the local key is a one-time copy from a free Tuya developer account — the guide walks you through it.
strings.onboarding.music.title: Music
strings.onboarding.music.blurb: Connect Spotify (Premium) to drive a Spotify Connect device, or import your own audio files — or do both.
strings.onboarding.music.localReady: The local library already has music.
strings.onboarding.music.localHint: Import an MP3/WAV/OGG to get started — you can add more anytime on the Music tab.
strings.onboarding.extras.title: Optional extras
strings.onboarding.extras.blurb: Both are optional and use your own API key: an AI assistant built into the panel, and Freesound for importing sound effects.
strings.onboarding.done.title: You're all set
strings.onboarding.done.blurb: A few starter scenes are already waiting — try tapping one to set the mood. Everything you skipped lives in Settings.
strings.onboarding.toast.welcome: Welcome! Tap a scene to set the mood.
strings.settings.device.title: This Device
strings.settings.device.apiKeyLabel: API key (only if the server has one configured)
strings.settings.developer.title: Developer
strings.settings.developer.hint: Surfaces the Logs tab — server logs plus a diagnostics panel. Stored on this device only.
strings.settings.toast.apiKeySaved: API key saved on this device
strings.settings.toast.devModeOn: Developer mode on — Logs tab added
strings.sceneEditor.lightsOffHint: The scene switches the lights off.
strings.sceneEditor.effectBaseHint: The effect animates from this base {0} and brightness.
strings.sceneEditor.driftHint: Tap colors to build a palette (2–4). Drift blends between them.
strings.sceneEditor.connectSpotifyPost: to pick from your playlists, or paste a link above.
strings.sceneEditor.noLocalMusicPre: No local music yet — import tracks on the
strings.sceneEditor.musicPauseHint: The scene pauses whatever is playing.
strings.sceneEditor.noSoundsPre: No sounds imported yet. Add some on the
strings.sceneEditor.soundsHint: Activating the scene stops current playback, then fires the picked sounds (each with its own volume/loop).
strings.sceneEditor.unknownHeading: Unknown — no longer in your library
strings.sceneEditor.toast.nameFirst: Give the scene a name first.
strings.sceneEditor.toast.noId: Couldn't derive an id from that name — use some letters or digits.
strings.sceneEditor.toast.driftColors: “{0}”: the Drift effect needs at least 2 colors.
strings.soundEditor.title: Edit Sound
strings.timeline.noSoundClips: No sound clips — add one below.
strings.timeline.noLightClips: No light clips — add one below.
strings.timeline.noSoundsPre: No sounds imported yet. Add some on the
strings.timeline.cutShort: Cut short: plays {0} of the sound's ~{1}.
strings.timeline.loopsUntilStopped: Loops until the event is stopped.
strings.timeline.soundMissing: This sound is no longer in your library.
strings.timeline.effectBase: The effect animates from this base {0} and brightness.
strings.timeline.driftHint: Tap colors to build a palette (2–4). Drift blends between them.
strings.timeline.offClipHint: This clip switches the light off for its window.
strings.keyframe.empty: No keyframes yet — add one to build the sequence.
strings.keyframe.offHint: This keyframe switches the light off.
strings.keyframe.cycleTooShort: Cycle must be at least {0}s (100 ms past the last keyframe).
strings.keyframe.playsOnce: Plays once, then holds the last keyframe.
strings.fxPicker.emptyPre: No saved effects yet. Create some on the
strings.fxPicker.liveReference: Live reference — editing it in the library updates every scene and event that uses it.
strings.fxPicker.missingPost: ). Pick another above, or choose a different effect type.
strings.screenArrange.title: Arrange
strings.screenArrange.compactHint: Smaller tiles, so a board with lots of shortcuts fits more on screen.
strings.screenArrange.noShortcuts: No shortcuts yet — add some below.
strings.screenArrange.spotifyHintPost: to pick playlists, or search for a track above.
strings.screenArrange.lightsHint: Adds a tile that resets the lights to the default you set in Settings.
strings.screenArrange.breakHint: Ends the current row so the next shortcuts start on a new line. Add a label to show it as a section heading.
strings.screenArrange.empty.scene: No scenes yet — create them on the Scenes tab.
strings.screenArrange.empty.event: No events yet — create them on the Events tab.
strings.screenArrange.empty.sound: No sounds yet — import them on the Sounds tab.
strings.screenArrange.toast.resetExists: This board already has a reset-lights shortcut.
strings.screenArrange.toast.nameFirst: Give the screen a name first.
strings.screen.notFoundBody: No screen with id “{0}”. It may have been deleted — head back to
strings.screen.empty: This screen is empty — tap Arrange to add shortcuts.
strings.screen.tapHint: Tap a shortcut to fire it. Arrange to add, reorder or remove.
strings.screen.toast.gone: That {0} no longer exists — open Arrange to remove the shortcut.
strings.screens.title: Screens
strings.screens.createHint: A screen just groups shortcuts — you'll pick which scenes, events, sounds and playlists go on it next.
strings.screens.emptyNote: No screens yet — group your favourite scenes, events and playlists into one board below.
strings.screens.tapHint: Tap a screen to open its board; arrange its shortcuts from inside.
strings.screens.toast.nameFirst: Give the screen a name first.
strings.screens.toast.badId: Couldn't derive an id from that name — use some letters or digits.
strings.eventEditor.timelineHint: Lay sound and light clips along the time axis. Drag a clip to move it, drag its right edge to resize, tap it to edit below. Lights flash then restore the live scene; sounds overlay whatever's playing.
strings.eventEditor.afterDefaultHint: Resets the lights to the configured default when the event finishes (music is left playing).
strings.eventEditor.afterPreviousHint: Returns to whatever was showing before — the live scene, or the default light.
strings.eventEditor.toast.nameFirst: Give the event a name first.
strings.eventEditor.toast.needClip: An event needs at least one sound or light clip.
strings.eventEditor.toast.tooLong: The timeline must end within 10 minutes.
strings.eventEditor.toast.driftColors: A Drift effect needs at least 2 colors.
strings.eventEditor.toast.pickSceneEnd: Pick a scene to go to when the event ends, or choose another ending.
strings.eventEditor.toast.noId: Couldn't derive an id from that name — use some letters or digits.
strings.events.title: Events
strings.events.empty: No events yet — conjure a thunderclap or a horn blast below.
strings.events.hint: Tap to fire. Use the edit corner to change the timeline; a stop button appears while an event is playing.
strings.effectEditor.testHint: Save first — the test runs the saved effect on the server's lights.
strings.effectEditor.deleteHint: Deleting detaches this FX: every scene / event using it keeps a private copy of the keyframes.
strings.effectEditor.toast.nameFirst: Give the effect a name first.
strings.effectEditor.toast.noId: Couldn't derive an id from that name — use some letters or digits.
strings.effectEditor.toast.noIdShort: Couldn't derive an id from that name.
strings.effects.title: Light FX Library
strings.effects.intro: Reusable light effects authored on the keyframe editor. Reference them from scene lights and event timelines — edits here flow through everywhere they're used.
strings.effects.empty: No effects yet — craft your first shimmer below.
strings.music.title: Music
strings.music.openSpotifyHint: Open Spotify on a device to start
strings.music.local.title: Local library
strings.music.local.pickTrackHint: Pick a track below to start
strings.music.local.importHint: Tracks play on the server's own speakers — no Spotify needed.
strings.music.local.empty: No tracks yet — import an audio file above.
strings.music.local.noPlaylists: No playlists yet — name one above to group tracks.
strings.music.local.emptyPlaylistHint: No tracks in this playlist yet — add them from a track's edit panel.
strings.lights.title: Lights
strings.lights.offline: Can't reach the panel API — lights are offline.
strings.lights.status.unavailable: Live bulb state unavailable — check the light provider in Settings.
strings.assistant.title: Assistant
strings.assistant.noKeyNotice: Pick an AI provider and add its API key on the Settings page to enable the assistant.
strings.assistant.emptyPrompt: Ask me to build a scene, wire up an event, or design a light effect.
strings.assistant.ctxDraft.scene: I'm working on the existing scene "{0}".
strings.assistant.ctxDraft.event: I'm working on the existing event "{0}".
strings.assistant.ctxDraft.effect: I'm working on the existing light effect "{0}".
strings.assistant.drawer.title: Assistant
strings.logs.title: Logs
strings.logs.emptyLevel: No log entries at this level.
strings.notFound.title: Not found
strings.notFound.pre: Sorry, the content you are looking for does not exist — head back to
strings.artField.label: Tile art
strings.artSearch.title: Search art
strings.artSearch.hint: Search for card art to use as tile art.
strings.artSearch.empty: No results — try a different search.
strings.nowRunning.label: Now Running
strings.tv.title: TV display
strings.tv.nowShowingAlt: What the TV is showing now
strings.tv.openHint: Open {0} on the table screen (a TV browser, a tablet, a cast tab).
strings.tv.labelPlaceholder: Optional — shown only here in the panel
strings.tv.fileTooLarge: That image is over the {0} MB upload limit.
strings.error.title.upstreamUnreachable: Upstream service unreachable — check the internet connection
strings.error.title.bulbUnreachable: Bulb unreachable — check Tuya:Ip and that the bulb is powered
strings.error.unauthorized.detail: Missing or wrong API key. Send it as an X-Api-Key header or ?apiKey= query parameter.
strings.error.common.idSlug: Id may only contain letters, digits, '-' and '_'.
strings.error.common.hexColor: '{0}' is not a valid hex color. Use #RGB or #RRGGBB, e.g. #FF8C2A.
strings.error.scene.notFound: No scene with id '{0}'. See GET /scenes.
strings.error.scene.brightnessRange: Light brightness must be between 0 and 100.
strings.error.scene.temperatureRange: Light temperature must be between 0 and 100.
strings.error.scene.lightBrightnessRange: Light '{0}' brightness must be between 0 and 100.
strings.error.scene.lightTemperatureRange: Light '{0}' temperature must be between 0 and 100.
strings.error.scene.lightKeySlug: Each scene light needs a LightKey slug ([a-z0-9-_]).
strings.error.scene.musicVolumeRange: Music volume must be between 0.0 and 1.0.
strings.error.scene.musicUri: Music id must be a Spotify link/URI (e.g. spotify:playlist:…) or a local library id (local:track:… / local:playlist:…): '{0}'.
strings.error.scene.musicSource: Music source must be 'spotify' or 'local', got '{0}'.
strings.error.effect.unknownType: Unknown effect type '{0}' on {1}. Use flicker, glow, storm, drift, custom or fx.
strings.error.effect.fxIdRequired: The 'fx' effect on {0} needs a library FX id (slug [a-z0-9-_]).
strings.error.effect.speedRange: Effect speed on {0} must be between 1 and 10.
strings.error.effect.intensityRange: Effect intensity on {0} must be between 1 and 10.
strings.error.effect.driftColors: The 'drift' effect on {0} needs at least 2 colors.
strings.error.keyframe.count: The 'custom' effect on {0} needs between 1 and 50 keyframes.
strings.error.keyframe.startRange: Keyframe {0} on {1} must start between 0 and {2} ms.
strings.error.keyframe.ascending: Keyframes on {0} must be in ascending time order.
strings.error.keyframe.spacing: Keyframes on {0} must be at least 100 ms apart.
strings.error.keyframe.brightnessRange: Keyframe {0} on {1} brightness must be between 0 and 100.
strings.error.keyframe.temperatureRange: Keyframe {0} on {1} temperature must be between 0 and 100.
strings.error.keyframe.transitionRange: Keyframe {0} on {1} transition must be between 0 and 60000 ms.
strings.error.keyframe.empty: Keyframe {0} on {1} must set power, color, brightness or temperature.
strings.error.keyframe.cycleRequired: The looping 'custom' effect on {0} needs a cycle length.
strings.error.keyframe.cycleTooShort: The cycle length on {0} must be at least {1} ms (100 ms past the last keyframe).
strings.error.keyframe.cycleTooLong: The cycle length on {0} must be at most {1} ms.
strings.error.screen.tooManyTiles: A screen can hold at most {0} shortcuts.
strings.error.screen.unknownKind: Unknown tile kind '{0}'. Expected one of: {1}.
strings.error.screen.musicTileUri: Music tile needs a Spotify URI/link, got '{0}'.
strings.error.screen.musicTileLabel: Music tile needs a label (the playlist/track name).
strings.error.screen.tileRefRequired: A '{0}' tile needs the id of the {0} it points at.
strings.error.event.notFound: No event with id '{0}'. See GET /events/list.
strings.error.event.reservedId: Event id 'list', 'stop' and 'state' are reserved (they'd shadow the /events/list, /events/stop and /events/state routes).
strings.error.event.flashBrightnessRange: Flash brightness must be between 0 and 100.
strings.error.event.flashDurationRange: Flash duration must be between 1 and {0} ms.
strings.error.event.timelineExclusive: An event with timeline clips can't also set a flash or sound effects — the timeline replaces them.
strings.error.event.afterSceneId: Event 'after' set to a scene needs a scene id.
strings.error.event.timelineEmpty: A timeline needs at least one sound or light clip.
strings.error.event.soundClipId: Each timeline sound clip needs a soundId.
strings.error.event.soundClipStart: Timeline sound clip '{0}' start must be between 0 and {1} ms.
strings.error.event.soundClipDuration: Timeline sound clip '{0}' duration must be between {1} and {2} ms.
strings.error.event.soundClipVolume: Timeline sound clip '{0}' volume must be between 0.0 and 1.0.
strings.error.event.lightClipStart: Timeline light clip ({0}) start must be between 0 and {1} ms.
strings.error.event.lightClipDuration: Timeline light clip ({0}) duration must be between {1} and {2} ms.
strings.error.event.lightClipBrightness: Timeline light clip ({0}) brightness must be between 0 and 100.
strings.error.event.lightClipTemperature: Timeline light clip ({0}) temperature must be between 0 and 100.
strings.error.event.timelineTooLong: The timeline must end within {0} ms (10 minutes).
strings.error.sound.notFound: No sound with id '{0}'. See GET /sounds/list.
strings.error.sound.nameLength: Sound name must be {0} characters or fewer.
strings.error.sound.categoryLength: Sound category must be {0} characters or fewer.
strings.error.sound.volumeRange: Sound volume must be between 0.0 and 1.0.
strings.error.lightfx.notFound: No light FX with id '{0}'. See GET /lightfx/list.
strings.error.lightfx.reservedId: Light FX id 'list', 'test' and 'stop' are reserved (they'd shadow the /lightfx routes).
strings.error.lightConfig.keySlug: Light key '{0}' must be a non-empty slug ([a-z0-9-_]).
strings.error.lightConfig.duplicateKey: Duplicate light key '{0}'. Keys must be unique (case-insensitive).
strings.error.lightConfig.defaultBrightness: Default light brightness must be between 0 and 100.
strings.error.lightConfig.defaultTemperature: Default light temperature must be between 0 and 100.
strings.error.setup.sectionsRequired: Provider, Hue and Tuya sections are all required.
strings.error.setup.clientIdRequired: A Spotify Client ID is required.
strings.error.setup.loginExpired: Login expired or invalid — try connecting again.
strings.error.setup.noAuthCode: Spotify did not return an authorization code.
strings.error.setup.hueParams: Pass ?bridgeIp=...&appKey=... or save the bridge IP and app key on the Settings page first.
strings.error.setup.unknownRegion: Unknown region '{0}'. Use eu, eu-w, us, us-e, cn or in.
strings.error.setup.freesoundKeyRequired: A Freesound API token is required.
strings.error.upload.multipartRequired: Upload must be multipart/form-data with a 'file' field.
strings.error.imageSearch.badQuery: The image search couldn't be run: {0}
strings.error.imageImport.hostNotAllowed: That image url isn't on an allowed image-source host.
strings.error.imageImport.unsupportedType: Unsupported image type '{0}'. Allowed: webp, jpg, png.
strings.error.tv.imageNotFound: No uploaded image named '{0}'. Upload it first (POST /images/upload) and pass the returned stored name.
strings.error.light.noDefault: No default lighting is set — configure it on the Settings page first.
strings.error.music.notSpotifyUri: Music id is not a Spotify link/URI: '{0}' — Kenku support was removed; use a spotify: URI or open.spotify.com link.
strings.error.music.repeatMode: mode must be one of: off, track, playlist
strings.error.music.badUri: Not a recognized Spotify track/playlist/album/artist URI or link: {0}
strings.error.music.unknownPlayId: Music id '{0}' isn't a Spotify link/URI or a local library id (local:track:… / local:playlist:…).
strings.error.music.emptyPlaylist: The playlist '{0}' has no playable tracks.
strings.error.notFound.musicTrack: No music track with id '{0}'. See GET /music/library/tracks.
strings.error.notFound.musicPlaylist: No music playlist with id '{0}'. See GET /music/library/playlists.
strings.error.musicTrack.nameLength: Track name must be {0} characters or fewer.
strings.error.musicTrack.artistLength: Track artist must be {0} characters or fewer.
strings.error.musicPlaylist.nameLength: Playlist name must be {0} characters or fewer.
strings.error.freesound.unauthorized: Freesound rejected the API token — check it on the Settings page.
strings.error.freesound.noPreview: That Freesound sound has no preview to import (id {0}).
strings.error.assistant.busySend: Assistant is busy — wait or stop the current run.
strings.error.assistant.busyClear: Assistant is busy — stop the current run before clearing.
strings.error.notConfigured.spotifyClientId: Set your Spotify Client ID in Settings before connecting.
strings.error.notConfigured.spotifyConnect: Spotify is not connected — open Settings and connect Spotify first.
strings.error.notConfigured.spotifyClientIdSet: Spotify Client ID is not set — open Settings and enter it first.
strings.error.notConfigured.hue: Philips Hue is not configured. Set the bridge IP and app key on the Settings page (or PUT /setup/config). Use GET /setup/hue/discover to find the bridge and GET /setup/hue/register to create an app key (see README).
strings.error.notConfigured.tuya: Tuya bulb is not configured. Set the IP, device id and local key on the Settings page (or PUT /setup/config). Use GET /setup/scan to find the IP and GET /setup/local-keys to get the local key (see README).
strings.error.notConfigured.assistantKey: AI provider API key is not set — add it on the Settings page.
strings.error.notConfigured.freesound: Freesound is not configured — add your API token on the Settings page.
